overview: Vault provides encrypted, deduplicated backups powered by restic.
capabilities: Host backup controls in the native launcher
Keep restic-specific setup outside Misty core
Prepare a future surface for scheduling and restore
permissions: Future filesystem read access for selected backup roots
Future shell access to run restic
getting_started: Launch Vault to configure backups once available.
changelog: v0.1.0 - Moved Vault out of core and into a plugin placeholder.
